emails.subject: FW: BNP Master Netting Agreement
emails.body: FW: BNP Master Netting Agreement Hi, Una! I don't know if you can help me or not, but I need the below agreements ASAP. We have to finalize a master netting agreement and the lawyer over here needs to see the agreements. If you are not the right person, will you forward my e-mail on? Thanks! Marie To: Cooper, Edmund

emails.subject: RE: BNP Master Netting Agreement
emails.body: RE: BNP Master Netting Agreement Hi Marie, I have found the 1st two but can't locate anything on the 3rd one. Will need more detail to assist. Una

emails.subject: RE: BNP Master Netting Agreement
emails.body: Hi, Una: Thanks for sending me those two ISDAs. Hopefully, Edmund Cooper will be able to help us find the other document. Again, thanks for your help. Marie
